params.TriggerDescription: Red-Eye — Whenever chaos ensues, for each opponent, goad up to one target creature that opponent controls. Until end of turn, those creatures can't become tapped unless they're being declared as attackers.

params.Description: Song of the Ood — Noncreature spells have convoke. (A player's creatures can help cast those spells. Each creature they tap while casting a noncreature spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
